response: Imagine you just got a shiny new yellow electrical plug designed for American outlets. You’re holding it over three different wall sockets: one with two round prongs, another with two flat prongs, and a third with three prongs (two flat and one round). Which socket should you plug it into?

meta.system: Reword this puzzle in a different natural style, SAME facts, SAME question. Reply ONLY the reworded text.
meta.user: You have a brand-new yellow US plug. Put it into one of these wall sockets: the round-pin socket, the flat-pin socket, or the three-pin socket. Which one?
